title: Warm up
content: The slide presents images associated with three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image reflects distinctive features or activities related to the cities.
key_claims: Chongqing image involves reading or learning.
Hangzhou focuses on technology and interaction.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: Taxis and images of cityscapes underscore the theme of evolution and journey through China. This sets the stage for exploring the dynamic changes within the nation.
key_claims: Cities represent cultural and architectural evolution.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: Focus on investigating and researching city chains by examining local features, development strategies, and outcomes. The session outlines a structured approach to understanding city development.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide connects cities with their respective development strategies. Beijing integrates technology and tradition, Chongqing focuses on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou emphasizes tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: Describes cities through drivers' perspectives highlighting sustainable development, economic growth, and technology integration. Emphasizes that cities adopt unique strategies based on local characteristics.
key_claims: Cities evolve using unique development strategies.
Strategies based on local features promote development.
因地制宜 highlights the tailored approach to city growth.
